title: Garlicky Flax Wrap
description: A crispy, savory breakfast wrap made with flax eggs and a hint of garlic.

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: use 2 cloves for extra garlicky flavor

ingredients.name: wrap
ingredients.notes: or substitute with a whole wheat tortilla

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle to medium-high heat.
Crack in the flax eggs and cook until the edges start to set.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Warm the wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds, or in the oven for 5-7 minutes.
Assemble the wrap by placing the cooked egg mixture onto the center of the wrap.
Add crispy bits to taste, and season with salt.
Fold the wrap in half and serve immediately.
